Home/Conservation
Environmental Action

Protecting Our Natural Heritage

Volcano Arts Center integrates sustainable tourism with environmental preservation. Through community education, tree planting, and eco-conscious experiences, we safeguard the wildlife surrounding Volcanoes National Park.

Reforestation Drive

Restoring vital habitats for endangered mountain gorillas by planting indigenous trees.

85,000 / 100,000 Trees Planted

Community Education

Educating local youth and former poachers on the long-term value of environmental preservation.

12 / 20 Communities Reached

Sustainable Art

Pioneering zero-waste artisan practices utilizing recycled and responsibly sourced natural materials.

Core Practice Adopted

Invest in the Future of
Rwanda's Ecosystem

100% of your tax-deductible donation goes directly toward on-the-ground initiatives protecting our forests and empowering our local stewards.

  • ✓ Direct Impact: Funds bypass bureaucracy and immediately support field teams.
  • ✓ Community Led: Strategies are overseen by local elders and conservationists.

Make a Contribution

Your support makes a difference.
